name: Incident Containment Checklist
description: Executes an incident containment checklist by looping through predefined containment steps. A code node builds the containment action list based on the alert type (network isolation, account disable, firewall block, etc.), then Riggs AI assesses the incident to prioritize containment order. A loop iterates over each containment step, executing the response action and logging completion. After all steps are executed, a summary is posted to the SOC channel and the incident status is updated to contained.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Isolate affected endpoints as part of containment actions

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Post containment progress and completion summary to SOC channel

config.description: Triggers on any high or critical severity alert requiring containment actions

config.additional_instructions: Identify the threat type and recommend a prioritized list of containment actions. Consider network isolation, account lockout, firewall rules, and process termination.
config.description: AI-powered assessment to determine the appropriate containment strategy and action priority

script.code:
def main(alert, analysis):
    actions = []
    actions.append({'step': 1, 'action': 'isolate_endpoint', 'target': alert.get('hostname', ''), 'description': 'Isolate affected endpoint from network'})
    actions.append({'step': 2, 'action': 'disable_account', 'target': alert.get('username', ''), 'description': 'Disable compromised user account'})
    actions.append({'step': 3, 'action': 'block_ioc', 'target': alert.get('ioc', ''), 'description': 'Block malicious IOC at firewall'})
    actions.append({'step': 4, 'action': 'kill_process', 'target': alert.get('process_name', ''), 'description': 'Terminate malicious process on endpoint'})
    actions.append({'step': 5, 'action': 'quarantine_file', 'target': alert.get('file_hash', ''), 'description': 'Quarantine suspicious file'})
    return {'containment_steps': actions, 'total_steps': len(actions)}

config.description: Generate the ordered containment action list based on alert context and AI recommendations
Iterate over each containment action in the prioritized checklist
Execute the current containment action from the checklist against the target system
Log the completion of each containment step for the audit trail
Notify the SOC team that all containment steps have been completed
Update the incident status to contained after all checklist actions are completed
Incident containment checklist fully executed — all actions completed, status updated to contained
